load_failed_error: Failed to load catalogue source data for the work detail editor.
missing_detail_param: Search for a work detail by detail id.
save_mode_unavailable_hint: Local catalogue server unavailable. Save is disabled.
create_mode_unavailable_hint: Local catalogue server unavailable. Create is disabled.
new_context_loaded: Creating a draft detail under work {work_id}.
new_context_parent_missing: Open new detail mode from a parent work editor or provide a work id.
new_context_parent_unknown: Cannot create a detail because parent work {work_id} was not found.
new_context_parent_unpublished: Publish work {work_id} before adding work details.
field_parent_work_unpublished: Publish the parent work before adding work details.
save_status_saving_and_updating: Saving source record and updating site…
save_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload the detail before saving again.
save_result_success_applied: Saved source changes and updated the parent work output at {saved_at}.
save_result_success_partial: Source changes were saved at {saved_at}, but the public update failed.
save_result_unchanged: Source already matches the current form values.
bulk_save_result_success_applied: Saved {count} detail records and updated the parent work output at {saved_at}.
bulk_save_result_success_partial: Saved {count} detail records at {saved_at}, but the public update failed.
build_preview_template: Public update preview: work {work_ids}; series {series_ids}; catalogue search {search_rebuild}.
build_preview_unpublished: Public update unavailable while the detail is not published.
build_result_success: Parent work output updated at {completed_at}. Studio Activity updated.
publication_status_invalid: Publication is available only for draft or published details.
publication_status_validation_error: Fix validation errors before changing publication state.
unpublish_confirm_dirty_note: Unsaved form changes will be discarded.
publication_status_public_failed: Publication state changed, but the public update failed.
publication_result_public_failed: Source status changed, but public artifacts did not finish updating.
publication_result_published: Detail is published and parent work output has been updated.
publication_result_unpublished: Detail is draft again and public output has been cleaned up.
publication_status_conflict: Source record changed since this page loaded. Reload before changing publication state.
readiness_action_busy: Wait for the current save or public update to finish.
media_refresh_save_first: Save source changes before refreshing media.
media_refresh_result_success: Thumbnails updated; primary variants staged for publishing.
field_invalid_sort_order: Use a whole number or leave blank.
field_duplicate_detail_id: Detail id already exists for this work.
create_status_validation_error: Fix validation errors before creating the draft detail.
create_result_success: Created draft detail {detail_uid}. Opening edit mode...
summary_rebuild_needed: public update failed in this session
summary_rebuild_current: source and parent work output are aligned in this session
new_summary_next: Create the draft, then continue editing or publish from edit mode.
new_runtime_state: Public site update is unavailable until the draft detail exists.
